CustomObject.description: Per-brand (and optionally per-form) visual theme for Field Forms: logo, colors, header, section ordering and locale. Keyed by Scope__c (the same brand partition key as Account.Form_Scope__c / Form_Template__c.Scope__c). Consumed by both the live form renderer (CSS custom properties) and the branded PDF report. Resolution is most-specific-first: form-level (Form_Template__c set) -> brand-level (Scope__c set) -> global default (both null). (Vignette 4)
CustomObject.label: Brand Theme
